page_metadata.biotools__summary: PSAweb is a web server, developed to analyze the amino acid sequence and multiple sequence alignment of proteins. This is a comprehensive on-line Internet tool that allows the rapid visualization of an analysis, by output in GIF format. It assists the user in analyzing and presenting the primary structure of proteins and mutiple alignment of protein sequences
